headline: INVH Q1 FFO Meets Estimates as Revenues Top on Homebuilding
summary: INVH posts in-line Q1 FFO as revenues jump 8.8% on rental growth and new homebuilding income, offset by rising expenses and mixed leasing trends.

headline: Invitation Homes Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish?
summary: Invitation Homes has considerably lagged the broader market over the past year, yet Wall Street analysts maintain a moderately optimistic outlook about the stock’s prospects.
